name: Five segments — stable → motion → more motion → climax → stable
description: Segment 1: calm/stable. 2–3: ramp movement. 4: climax. 5: afterglow, return to stable.

segments.high_level_prompt: Calm opening: subtle breathing, small idle shifts, stable pose; no orgasm, low energy.
Clear increase in motion: hips, hands, faster rhythm; building tension; still no climax.
Peak movement before release: strongest motion so far, tension at max; do not climax yet.
She reaches orgasm: visible release, squirt if appropriate, eyes and mouth showing full climax.
Afterglow: slower movement, relaxed breathing, return to calm and stability; no second climax.
